57533.title: MTV's Sounds Of 1984!
57533.description: We're powering-up the time machine and going back to celebrate the first years of our MTV lives! This time we land in... 1984!

57534.title: Greatest 80s Rock: Play It Loud!
57534.description: Hard! Alternative! Heavy! Post-punk! Metal! Indie! Goth! Call it what you want, but turn up the volume as we delve into the decade's best rock tracks in all their incarnations, right here on MTV!

57535.title: ... So 80s!
57535.description: Get ready because we're bringing you nothing but classic hits and iconic anthems from the 80s!
